Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}Ngh, the inside of my mouth still tastes all—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 4 25 25}...Uh, I mean, coffee's meant to be taken black, don't you think? It's the only way to experience the natural taste of the beans.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}The one from Brazil is very smooth, while the Kilimanjaro one is more sour and full-bodied.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I read about it in a book. I also learned how to brew it and stuff.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}But it doesn't taste much different from the instant type... I wonder if the beans aren't good quality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I thought so too, but I heard the properly-brewed ones are completely different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}That's why I tried to learn how to make it, but... honestly, they taste the same to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Oh! Um, it's called a "Value Pack Blend." I bought it at the supermarket.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Does the quality of the beans really affect the flavor that much? Maybe I'll try some better ones next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Anyways, sorry for the sudden invite.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But they say that drinking coffee can help you relax and concentrate better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I just thought something like that might benefit us in our upcoming battles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}And, I figured if I could learn to make good coffee, people might find that useful.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I'll do some more research. I can tell there's room for improvement...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Sorry for asking you to help me clean up, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Please, take the leftovers with you. Although, you might not necessarily like it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Sure, I'd prefer my coffee to taste good, but I could do without all the test sips...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 4 25 25}Um! It's not that I don't appreciate the flavor, it's just that it's not good for an elementary school kid to drink too much, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}And you seem like someone who'd appreciate a good cup of coffee, like from a café.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I hope you have another cup the next time I make some. I'll make sure it tastes better by then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I'm using different beans today. I went to a coffee shop and bought some real ones this time![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I made sure to store them in the fridge, and I only ground them right before brewing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I also learned you need to be mindful of how hot the water is as well as how you pour it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Yes, I practiced with the cheaper beans from before since I can't afford too many of the expensive ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}...Although it was hard to drink all that coffee, so I added a lot of milk and sugar.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Well, I practiced with the cheaper beans from before since I can't afford too many of the expensive ones.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Although, this is the first time I'm brewing with these fancier beans. I wonder how it'll turn out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 4 25 25}Oh, sorry! You're right, coffee is best when it's hot and fresh![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}It's still really bitter... So bitter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}But it's not only that. I could actually taste some of the sweetness and richness this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}The beans and brewing technique can make a huge difference, huh? Oh, and the smell was great, too![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I'm feeling a little nostalgic, actually...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Thanks for joining me, {f 4 1}-san. You can go on ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I'm gonna practice a little more to try and get the hang of this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Let's make some more if we ever get the chance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 4 25 25}Uh, first I gotta use the bathroom...! I drank a lot while I was practicing today...[n]{f 1 1}
